tables.description: Registry_Exams_2: This dataset has been checked for HIPAA sensitive information, consistency between the asserted data in the study description with the data available through dbGaP, distributable study document corresponding to the dataset, format for study loading, and items that may be ambiguous to dbGaP users. Code meanings and truncated variable descriptions are provided as submitted. For questions regarding the data, please contact the study investigators.

variables.name: AltCardiolipinLow
variables.description: Altered compositions of molecular species of cardiolipin (e.g. tetralinoleoyl-cardiolipin) <25% of normal reference mean

variables.name: AminoAcids
variables.description: Blood analysis - plasma aminio acids performed

variables.name: CardiolipinLow
variables.description: Total cardiolipin less than 50% of normal

variables.name: GelNormal
variables.description: More or equal to 60% of normal mean activity reference nDNA-encoded mitochondrial enzymes (e.g. citrate synthase or succinate dehydrogenase) 1

variables.name: HPLCBuffy
variables.description: HPLC for Coenzyme Q10 source: buffy coat

variables.name: HPLCCellLine
variables.description: HPLC for Coenzyme Q10 source: cell line

variables.name: HPLCLeukocytes
variables.description: HPLC for Coenzyme Q10 source: leukocytes

variables.name: HPLCLiver
variables.description: HPLC for Coenzyme Q10 source: liver

variables.name: HPLCMuscle
variables.description: HPLC for Coenzyme Q10 source: muscle

variables.name: HPLCNormal
variables.description: More or equal to 60% of normal mean activity reference nDNA-encoded mitochondrial enzymes (e.g. citrate synthase or succinate dehydrogenase) 2

variables.name: HPLCOther
variables.description: HPLC for Coenzyme Q10 source: other

variables.name: HPLCPlatelets
variables.description: HPLC for Coenzyme Q10 source: platelets

variables.name: MuscleMicroscopy
variables.description: Electron microscopy on muscle tissue performed

variables.name: MuscleMicroscopyNormal
variables.description: Electron microscopy on muscle tissue normal

variables.name: MuscleMicroscopyPleoconialOncocytic
variables.description: If yes, to MuscleMicrosopyPleoconial Oncocytic changes

variables.name: MuscleMicroscopyRarefactionLarge
variables.description: If yes, to MuscleMicrosopyRarefaction in large areas or in the center of fibers (not minicores or multicores)

variables.name: MuscleMorphCOXDeficientLevel
variables.description: If yes to MuscleMorphCOXDeficient percentage of COX-deficent fibers

variables.name: MuscleMorphRaggedBlueLevel
variables.description: If yes to MuscleMorphRaggedBlue percentage of ragged blue fibers

variables.name: MuscleMorphRaggedRedLevel
variables.description: If yes, to MuscleMorphRaggedRed percentage of ragged red fibers

variables.name: MuscleMorphRarefactionLarge
variables.description: If yes to MuscleMorphRarefaction in large areas or in the center of fibers (not minicores or multicores)

variables.name: PDCBuffy
variables.description: Radioisotope assay for PDC source: buffy coat

variables.name: PDCCellLine
variables.description: Radioisotope assay for PDC source: cell line

variables.name: PDCLeukocytes
variables.description: Radioisotope assay for PDC source: leukocytes

variables.description: Radioisotope assay for PDC source: liver

variables.description: Radioisotope assay for PDC source: muscle

variables.name: PDCNormal
variables.description: >=60% of normal mean activity reference nDNA-encoded mitochondrial enzymes (e.g. citrate synthase or succinate dehydrogenase) 4

variables.description: Radioisotope assay for PDC source: platelets

variables.name: PolarLooseCoupling
variables.description: Loose coupling of oxidation and phosphorylation

variables.name: PolarNormal
variables.description: >=60% of normal mean activity reference nDNA-encoded mitochondrial enzymes (e.g. citrate synthase or succinate dehydrogenase) 3

variables.name: SpectroNormal
variables.description: >=60% of normal mean activity reference nDNA-encoded mitochondrial enzymes (e.g. citrate synthase or succinate dehydrogenase) 5

variables.name: WesternNormal
variables.description: >=60% of normal mean activity reference nDNA-encoded mitochondrial enzymes (e.g. citrate synthase or succinate dehydrogenase) 6
